series_metadata.series_description: Submittals transferring order for unit operations between owners. Division letter confirming transfer in records, including mailed letters, returned mail, and proof of mailing.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: 7 years after the revocation of a unit order. If records are scanned into an electronic format, the paper copy may be recycled at that time. ; Electronic: 7 years after the revocation of a unit order., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
